cases.request: Introduce orchestration indirection for multi-skill requests and ensure complete output coverage.
Implement code changes and execute the plan tasks.
Learn this topic, decompose it, and challenge assumptions before we implement.
Review all skills and produce an audit with remediation recommendations.
Reorganize our documentation corpus, normalize naming, and regenerate a navigable INDEX across folders.
Write technical reference docs from code and then refresh the documentation index and catalog structure.
Generate a PRD and ensure the docs corpus structure and index make it easy to discover.
Create an ADR with alternatives and consequences, then update document taxonomy and indexes.

We have a regression with stack traces and exceptions; perform root-cause analysis and fix it.
Draft a system boundary blueprint and decision record, then pressure-test the trade-offs.
Request a structured code review and then remediate accepted findings.
